title: Easy multiple-choice (ARC-Easy / OpenBookQA / CommonsenseQA sample)
system_prompt: You are an expert at reasoning and you always pick the most realistic answer. Think step by step and take as much reasoning as you need; do not rush. You MUST finish with a line in exactly this format: Final Answer: X where X is one of the letters A, B, C, D, E, or F. Do not stop before writing that final line.
source: frozen sample: ARC-Easy (allenai/ai2_arc, ARC-Easy/train, rows 0-24), OpenBookQA (allenai/openbookqa, main/train, rows 0-24), CommonsenseQA (tau/commonsense_qa, default/train, rows 0-14)

questions.prompt: Which factor will most likely cause a person to develop a fever?
choices: a leg muscle relaxing after exercise
a bacterial population in the bloodstream
several viral particles on the skin
carbohydrates being digested in the stomach

questions.prompt: Lichens are symbiotic organisms made of green algae and fungi. What do the green algae supply to the fungi in this symbiotic relationship?
When a switch is used in an electrical circuit, the switch can
choices: cause the current to change direction.
stop and start the flow of current.

questions.prompt: A chewable calcium carbonate tablet is a common treatment for stomach discomfort. Calcium carbonate is most likely used as this type of medicine because calcium carbonate
Which two body systems are directly involved in movement?
Which change in the state of water particles causes the particles to become arranged in a fixed position?
Earth's core is primarily composed of which of the following materials?
In humans, the digestion process begins in
choices: the mouth, with chewing and saliva.
the stomach, with churning and acid.
the esophagus, with pushing towards the stomach.

questions.prompt: A population of small, plant-eating beetles lives in a forest. About half of the beetles are light brown and the others are dark green. If years of drought cause the area to become dry with few trees, what would the beetle population most likely look like after several generations?
choices: It would be mostly light brown beetles.
It would be mostly dark green beetles.
It would be mostly carnivorous beetles.
It would be mostly very large beetles.

questions.prompt: The sun is responsible for
choices: children growing up and getting old

questions.prompt: Stars are
choices: great balls of gas burning billions of miles away

questions.prompt: Poison causes harm to which of the following?
As a car approaches you in the night
choices: the headlights recede into the dark
the headlights remain at a constant
